title: Exam Season | #shorts
full_text: Hello guys. Today we're doing trivia. First to three points wins. What is the process of a caterpillar turning into a butterfly? Metamorphosis. I I I was expecting Okay, next question. What is the capital of Australia? Sydney. Melbourne. Adelaide. No. Uh, Austria. No. What is it? Canber. Oh, yeah. Yeah. Yeah. I knew that. Who wrote the Harry Potter book series? JK Ring. What is the process by which plants make their food called? Oh, this is I said I said it. I said it. I get the point. You announce it for me. What? Comment down below who do you think got that point first. The first five people to say I win get a follow back from me. Who wrote the famous play Romeo and Juliet? Oh my god.
